subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, it draweth hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم انه یجذب افئده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @idolatry, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
